description: ShadowRealm Network — single source of truth for all ShadowWalkerNC apps

apps.name: post-pilot
apps.label: Post-Pilot Pro
apps.description: Social media posting engine — caption generation + multi-platform publishing

apps.name: sigil
apps.label: Sigil
apps.description: Discord bot — culinary ops, shift scheduling, community management

apps.name: culinaryos
apps.label: CulinaryOS
apps.description: All-in-one culinary intelligence platform — Android (Kotlin/Compose) + Web ERP (React/Supabase) + REST API
apps.notes: REST API layer is the SRN integration point

apps.name: shadowbot
apps.label: ShadowBot
apps.description: AI agent system and multi-agent orchestration on the Odysseus framework
apps.notes: Natural ShadowRealm orchestration candidate — assess architecture first

apps.name: nexcms
apps.label: NexCMS
apps.description: Custom website builder and CMS — React, Supabase
apps.notes: CMS content events can trigger Post-Pilot posts

apps.name: recipeOS
apps.label: RecipeOS
apps.description: Recipe creation and kitchen management — Kotlin Android
apps.notes: Recipe events (new recipe, featured dish) can trigger social posts via Post-Pilot

apps.name: restrevive-ai
apps.label: RestRevive AI
apps.description: Restaurant operations intelligence — React 18, Supabase, Anthropic API
apps.notes: Operations insights can feed Post-Pilot post generation context

apps.name: bibledesk
apps.label: BibleDesk
apps.description: AI-powered Bible evidence platform — React, Supabase, Anthropic API

apps.name: shadowrealm
apps.label: ShadowRealm
apps.description: Orchestrator, registry, and AI agent dispatcher for the ShadowWalkerNC ecosystem
